---
title: "Bilingual Assholes Total: Expletive Task Graphs"
author: "morgan moyer"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(multcomp) # not available for this version of R
library(stringr)
library(textstem)
library(sciplot)
library(tidyverse)
theme_set(theme_bw())
cbPalette <- c("#56B4E9", "#D55E00", "#009E73","#999999", "#E69F00")
vaPalette <- c("#FCC6BB", "#F54927", "#9C2007", "#440E03")
gPal <- c("#B9E615","#5E15E6","#F78D02", "#009E73")

# scale_fill_manual(values = vaPalette)
# valPal <- c("#F4320B")

this.dir <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
setwd(this.dir)
source("../helpers.R")

df_s1 <- read.csv("../../01_experiment/data/processed_expl.csv")
df_s1["Study"] <- "Study1"
length(unique(df_s1$Participant))

df_s2 <- read.csv("../../02_experiment/data/data_exclusions.csv")
df_s2["Study"] <- "Study2"
df_s2$X.1 <- NULL
length(unique(df_s2$Participant))
# offset the participant numbering
df_s2$Participant <- df_s2$Participant + max(df_s1$Participant)

names(df_s1)
names(df_s2)

d <- rbind(df_s1,df_s2)
length(unique(d$Participant)) # 458
```


## Summary Stats
```{r}
agr <- d %>% 
  group_by(Valence) %>% 
  summarize(MeanAcceptability = mean(SliderResponse),
            SD = sd(SliderResponse))
print(agr)

```


```{r}
agr <- d %>% 
  filter(TrialType == "test") %>% 
  group_by(ContextCondition,Nativeness) %>% 
  reframe(MeanAcceptability = mean(SliderResponse), 
          CILow = ci.low(SliderResponse), 
          CIHigh = ci.high(SliderResponse)) %>%
  mutate(YMin = MeanAcceptability - CILow, 
         YMax = MeanAcceptability + CIHigh)


dodge = position_dodge(.9)
ggplot(data=agr, aes(x=ContextCondition,y=MeanAcceptability,fill=Nativeness)) +
  geom_bar(position=dodge,stat="identity",color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=YMin,ymax=YMax),width=.25,position=position_dodge(0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vaPalette) +
   theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )


```

```{r}
agr <- d %>% 
  filter(TrialType == "test") %>% 
  group_by(Nativeness,ContextCondition,LexicalType) %>% 
  reframe(MeanAcceptability = mean(SliderResponse), 
          CILow = ci.low(SliderResponse), 
          CIHigh = ci.high(SliderResponse)) %>%
  mutate(YMin = MeanAcceptability - CILow, 
         YMax = MeanAcceptability + CIHigh)


dodge = position_dodge(.9)
ggplot(data=agr, aes(x=LexicalType,y=MeanAcceptability,fill=Nativeness)) +
  geom_bar(position=dodge,stat="identity",color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~ContextCondition) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=YMin,ymax=YMax),width=.25,position=position_dodge(0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vaPalette) +
   theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )


```


```{r}
agr <- d %>% 
  filter(TrialType == "test") %>% 
  group_by(Nativeness,Valence,ContextCondition,LexicalType) %>% 
  reframe(MeanAcceptability = mean(SliderResponse), 
          CILow = ci.low(SliderResponse), 
          CIHigh = ci.high(SliderResponse)) %>%
  mutate(YMin = MeanAcceptability - CILow, 
         YMax = MeanAcceptability + CIHigh)


dodge = position_dodge(.9)
ggplot(data=agr, aes(x=LexicalType,y=MeanAcceptability,fill=Nativeness)) +
  geom_bar(position=dodge,stat="identity",color = "black") +
  facet_grid(Valence~ContextCondition) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=YMin,ymax=YMax),width=.25,position=position_dodge(0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vaPalette) +
   theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )


```



# L2 Only

```{r}
agr <- d %>% 
  filter(Nativeness == "L2") %>% 
  filter(TrialType == "test") %>% 
  group_by(Valence,ContextCondition) %>% 
  reframe(MeanAcceptability = mean(SliderResponse), 
          CILow = ci.low(SliderResponse), 
          CIHigh = ci.high(SliderResponse)) %>%
  mutate(YMin = MeanAcceptability - CILow, 
         YMax = MeanAcceptability + CIHigh)


dodge = position_dodge(.9)
ggplot(data=agr, aes(x=ContextCondition,y=MeanAcceptability,fill=Valence)) +
  geom_bar(position=dodge,stat="identity",color = "black") +
  # facet_wrap(~LexicalType) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=YMin,ymax=YMax),width=.25,position=position_dodge(0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vaPalette) +
   theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )


```


```{r}
agr <- d %>% 
  filter(Nativeness == "L2") %>% 
  filter(TrialType == "test") %>% 
  group_by(Valence,ContextCondition,LexicalType) %>% 
  reframe(MeanAcceptability = mean(SliderResponse), 
          CILow = ci.low(SliderResponse), 
          CIHigh = ci.high(SliderResponse)) %>%
  mutate(YMin = MeanAcceptability - CILow, 
         YMax = MeanAcceptability + CIHigh)


dodge = position_dodge(.9)
ggplot(data=agr, aes(x=LexicalType,y=MeanAcceptability,fill=Valence)) +
  geom_bar(position=dodge,stat="identity",color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~ContextCondition) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=YMin,ymax=YMax),width=.25,position=position_dodge(0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vaPalette) +
   theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )


```
